lists.8: Window go down in progress and below short drop 2

lists.10: Window go up in progress and below short drop 2
lists.11: Window go up in progress and with the top of short drop 2

lists.9: Glass is completely up (LVI not normalized)
lists.12: Glass is completely down (LVI not normalized)
